title: GameMode Permissions
description: This mod helps manage players' gamemode change permissions.
body:
### Use this mod instead: https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-permissions --- ## GameMode Permissions This mod helps manage players' gamemode change permissions. New commands and their permissions:
`/gms - "gmperms.suvival.own"`
`/gma - "gmperms.adventure.own"`
`/gmc - "gmperms.creative.own"`
`/gmsp - "gmperms.spectator.own"`
`/gms - "gmperms.suvival.other"`
`/gma - "gmperms.adventure.other"`
`/gmc - "gmperms.creative.other"`
`/gmsp - "gmperms.spectator.other"` --- If you have any issues or suggestions, please feel free to write them on the [GitHub page](https://github.com/somykOS/GMPerms).
This mod depends on the [fabric-permission-api](https://github.com/lucko/fabric-permissions-api/). That's why you should use a permission mod, such as [LuckPerms](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckperms).
Additionally, the mod was developed using the [Admiral library](https://github.com/henkelmax/admiral). --- You are welcome to support me via the following links:
